name: Ollama
description: Registers local Ollama models as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with local model discovery and embeddings for Metidos vector search.

env.description: Fallback Ollama base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:11434.
Optional fallback Ollama API key for authenticated compatible servers.

settings.label: Ollama base URL
settings.description: Ollama base URL. Must match this plugin's localhost allowlist unless the manifest is intentionally expanded.

settings.label: Ollama API key
settings.description: Optional Ollama API key for authenticated compatible servers. Falls back to OLLAMA_API_KEY.

providers.name: Ollama
providers.description: Discovers local Ollama tags, runs them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible completions transport, and exposes them for Ollama /api/embed embeddings.
